title: Discussion papers
summary: This is a landing/index page for ECB Discussion Papers, not an individual research document. The page contains only a generic description of what discussion papers are—research-based publications covering policy topics—without any specific paper titles, findings, or actionable data.
key_points: ECB Discussion Papers are research-based publications covering topics relevant to policy
Papers place analysis in the wider context of existing literature and address topics from a policy viewpoint
Papers 1-20 were originally published as part of the ECB Working Paper Series
Discussion Papers are available online only
Views expressed are those of the author(s) and do not necessarily reflect ECB official positions
why_it_matters: This page has no standalone research value. It is a navigation index that would need to be followed to access individual discussion papers. As a source for the archive, it provides no specific macro catalyst information, data points, or policy signals.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page per source_type classification - Rule 5 mandates rejection for listing pages
event_type set to 'unknown' but source contains no event-type-specific content to classify
